subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent forth from Our presence unto the concourse of the earth, wherein We counsel them with that whereby their stations shall be exalted before God, the Lord of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی ملاٴ الارض و نوصیهم بما ترتفع به مقاماتهم عندالله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
